examples.title: Gradient Descent Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of the gradient descent algorithm
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements the gradient descent algorithm, which is used to optimize the weights of a model.

examples.title: Directional Derivative
examples.description: A Python implementation of the directional derivative
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the directional derivative, which is used to compute the rate of change of a function in a specific direction.

examples.title: Gradient Vector
examples.description: A Java implementation of the gradient vector
examples.explanation: This Java code implements the gradient vector, which is used to compute the direction of the greatest rate of increase of a function.
